In attendance was: Vice President Vance Secretary of State Rubio Secretary of War Hegseth Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Caine Special Envoy Witkoff Jared Kushner CIA Director Ratcliffe Director of National Intelligence Gabbard was not included in the meeting. @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Latest Trump post: Iran doesn't want the Strait of Hormuz closed, they want it open so they can make $500 Million Dollars a day (which is, therefore, what they are losing if it is closed!). They only say they want it closed because I have it totally BLOCKADED (CLOSED!), so they merely want to "save face." People approached me four days ago, saying, "Sir, Iran wants to open up the Strait, immediately." But if we do that, there can never be a Deal with Iran, unless we blow up the rest of their Country, their leaders included! President DONALD J. TRUMP tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 最新特朗普帖子：伊朗并不想关闭霍尔木兹海峡，他们想让它保持开放，这样他们每天就能赚到5亿美元（因此，如果关闭，他们损失的就是这个数！）。他们之所以说想关闭它，只是因为我已经完全封锁了它（关闭了！），所以他们只是想“挽回面子”。四天前有人找到我，说：“先生，伊朗想立即开放海峡。”但如果我们那样做，就永远不可能与伊朗达成协议，除非我们炸毁他们国家的其余部分，包括他们的领导人！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @SecScottBessent : As @POTUS has made clear, the United States Navy will continue the blockade of Iranian ports. In a matter of days, Kharg Island storage will be full and the fragile Iranian oil wells will be shut in. Constraining Iran’s maritime trade directly targets the regime’s primary revenue lifelines. The @USTreasury will continue to apply maximum pressure through Economic Fury to systematically degrade Tehran’s ability to generate, move, and repatriate funds. Any person or vessel facilitating these flows—through covert trade and finance—risks exposure to U.S. sanctions. We continue to freeze the funds stolen by the corrupt leadership on behalf of the people of Iran. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 转发 @SecScottBessent：正如 @POTUS 所明确表示的那样，美国海军将继续封锁伊朗港口。几天之内，哈尔克岛的储油设施就会装满，脆弱的伊朗油井将被关闭。限制伊朗的海上贸易直接打击了该政权的主要收入生命线。@USTreasury 将继续通过“经济愤怒”施加最大压力，系统性地削弱德黑兰产生、转移和汇回资金的能力。任何通过秘密贸易和金融协助这些资金流动的个人或船只，都面临遭受美国制裁的风险。我们继续冻结腐败领导层窃取的代表伊朗人民的资金。推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 I'm not an expert on this topic, but I can confirm that the weather changed immediately after Iran destroyed US radars in the UAE at the start of the war. Dried-up lakes, including the famous Urmia Lake, revived after decades of drought, and we are experiencing many rainy days like the good old days (decades ago), many dams are overflowing. I'm not sure if there is a connection or just coincidence, but we are clearly seeing signs. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 我不是这个话题的专家，但我可以确认，在战争初期伊朗摧毁阿联酋的美国雷达后，天气立即发生了变化。包括著名的乌尔米耶湖在内的干涸湖泊在经历了数十年的干旱后复苏了，我们正在经历许多像过去（几十年前）那样的多雨日子，许多水坝都溢出了。我不确定这之间是否有联系，还是仅仅是巧合，但我们显然看到了迹象。🚩 抵抗战壕 | 助力

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇲🇽WaPo: The two U.S. embassy officials killed in a car crash alongside two Mexican officials in Chihuahua State worked for the CIA. They were returning from a meeting from a meeting with Mexican officials following a raid on a drug lab in a remote area…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 Mexican President Sheinbaum responds to a question about the Chihuahua State Attoney General Moreno changing his statement from U.S. officials to participating in a drug lab raid to not being involved at all in an El Universal interview. "Yes, if you want, we can inform you in more time. Yesterday, the Chihuahua prosecutor changed his statement. And we are investigating what these people were doing, and what agency they were from. So far, the information we have is that they were working together. Let's put it that way. So, all the investigation has to be done by the prosecution to see if the Constitution or the National Security Law were violated. And you will see all the information from the authorities of the state of Chihuahua." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇲🇽《华盛顿邮报》：在奇瓦瓦州一起车祸中丧生的两名美国大使馆官员，与两名墨西哥官员一同遇难，他们为中央情报局工作。他们当时正从一个偏远地区的毒品实验室突袭行动中，与墨西哥官员会面后返回……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇲🇽 墨西哥总统辛鲍姆回应了关于奇瓦瓦州总检察长莫雷诺改变口供的问题，他此前称美国官员参与了毒品实验室突袭，但在接受《环球报》采访时却称他们根本没有参与。“是的，如果你愿意，我们可以稍后再通知你。昨天，奇瓦瓦州检察官改变了他的说法。我们正在调查这些人当时在做什么，以及他们属于哪个机构。到目前为止，我们掌握的信息是他们当时在合作。我们就这么说吧。因此，所有的调查都必须由检察机关完成，以查看是否违反了宪法或国家安全法。你将会看到来自奇瓦瓦州当局的所有信息。” @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender According to the Washington Post, two U.S. destroyers were escorting two Iranian oil tankers, the Dorena and Sevin, that left the Iranian port of Chabahar before the beginning of the blockade. Per the reports, as of April 18, the Dorena was roughly 300 miles west of India’s southern coast in the Arabian Sea. Officials who spoke to the Washington Post declined to say where both ships were being escorted to. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据《华盛顿邮报》报道，两艘美国驱逐舰正在护送两艘伊朗油轮“多雷纳”号和“塞文”号，这两艘船在封锁开始前离开了伊朗恰巴哈尔港。据报道，截至4月18日，“多雷纳”号位于印度南海岸以西约300英里的阿拉伯海上。接受《华盛顿邮报》采访的官员拒绝透露这两艘船将被护送至何处。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump goes off on the Wall Street Journal: THE WALL STREET JOURNAL HAS LOST ITS WAY! An IDIOT on The Wall Street Journal’s Editorial Board, named Elliot Kaufman, just wrote an Op Ed entitled, “The Iranians Take Trump for a Sucker.” Really? For 47 years, they have killed our people, and many others, and taken advantage of every President, except me — And what did I give to them, a Country in tatters! Their entire Navy is at the bottom of the Sea, their Air Force is gone, their Anti Aircraft and Radar is wiped out, their Nuclear Labs and Storage Areas were OBLITERATED late one dark June evening by our Great B-2 Bombers, their leaders are DEAD, including General Soleimani, their evil genius who destroyed the lives of so many with his favored roadside bombs, the Strait of Hormuz is BLOCKADED and totally controlled by the U.S., with no Ships allowed to go to Iranian Ports — It is said that they are losing 500 Million Dollars a day because of this — Their Country is an Economic Catastrophe, that is hanging by a thread. Barack Hussein Obama gave them 1.7 Billion Dollars in “Green” Cash, flown in by a Boeing 757 to their leaders, and Hundreds of Billions of Dollars in order to help them on their way to a Nuclear Bomb. Other Presidents did nothing to stop them, a BLIGHT on the Office of the Presidency! But despite all of this, I have a MORON on the Editorial Board of The Wall Street Journal writing about me being taken for a “sucker.” Iran certainly doesn’t think so! Neither does anyone else. I guess Rupert Murdoch told him to write it this way, because The Wall Street Journal has lost its way, no longer required reading, just another failing political “RAG!” President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普抨击《华尔街日报》：《华尔街日报》已经迷失了方向！《华尔街日报》编辑部里有个叫埃利奥特·考夫曼的白痴，刚刚写了一篇题为《伊朗人把特朗普当傻瓜》的评论文章。真的吗？47年来，他们杀害了我们的人民以及许多其他人，并占了除我之外每一位总统的便宜——而我给了他们什么？一个支离破碎的国家！他们的整个海军都在海底，他们的空军没了，他们的防空和雷达被摧毁了，他们的核实验室和储存区在一个黑暗的六月夜晚被我们伟大的B-2轰炸机彻底抹平了，他们的领导人死了，包括苏莱曼尼将军，那个用他偏爱的路边炸弹摧毁了无数人生命的邪恶天才，霍尔木兹海峡被封锁并完全由美国控制，不允许任何船只进入伊朗港口——据说他们因此每天损失5亿美元——他们的国家是一场经济灾难，正悬于一线。巴拉克·侯赛因·奥巴马给了他们17亿美元的“绿色”现金，用波音757飞机运给他们的领导人，还有数千亿美元来帮助他们制造核弹。其他总统什么都没做来阻止他们，这是总统职位的耻辱！但尽管如此，《华尔街日报》编辑部里还是有个白痴写文章说我被当成了“傻瓜”。伊朗肯定不这么认为！其他人也不这么认为。我猜是鲁珀特·默多克让他这么写的，因为《华尔街日报》已经迷失了方向，不再是必读刊物，只不过是另一份失败的政治“小报”！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitness

text: Faytuks News RT @hugolowell : NEW: Trump convened his core national security team at the WH this afternoon to discuss path forward on Iran. Trump extending the ceasefire was the result of the meeting Vance, Rubio, Hegseth and Caine attended the meeting. DNI Tulsi Gabbard was not included, per person familiar tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 转发 @hugolowell : 最新消息：特朗普今天下午在白宫召集了他的核心国家安全团队，讨论伊朗问题的后续路径。特朗普延长停火协议是此次会议的结果。万斯、卢比奥、赫格塞斯和凯恩出席了会议。据知情人士透露，国家情报总监图尔西·加巴德未被列入名单。推文

text: WarMonitor RT @atrupar : REPORTER: Can you explain the computer log in issue? Your lawsuit contends you were not able to log into the system KASH PATEL: Let's have a survey. How many of you people believe that's true? REPORTER: Did you communicate with anyone you thought you were fired? PATEL: It's an absolute lie. It never happened. You are lying. REPORTER: The lawsuit says the opposite! tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转发 @atrupar : 记者：你能解释一下电脑登录的问题吗？你的诉讼声称你无法登录系统。卡什·帕特尔（KASH PATEL）：我们来做个调查。你们中有多少人相信那是真的？记者：你是否与任何你认为你被解雇的人沟通过？帕特尔：这绝对是谎言。从来没有发生过。你在撒谎。记者：诉讼内容恰恰相反！推文

text: 🇮🇷 | Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya (Armed Forces) warns the US: In light of the repeated threats by Trump & its invading terrorist commanders we warn them: Our capable & powerful forces have long been at a state of 100% readiness, with their fingers on the trigger so that in the event of aggression or any action against Iran, we will immediately and forcefully strike pre-designated targets and deliver another lesson, harsher than before, to the US aggressor & the child-killing Zionist regime. @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🇮🇷 | 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚（武装部队）警告美国：鉴于特朗普及其入侵的恐怖主义指挥官的反复威胁，我们警告他们：我们能干而强大的部队早已处于100%的战备状态，手指扣在扳机上，以便在发生针对伊朗的侵略或任何行动时，我们将立即有力地打击预定目标，并给美国侵略者和杀害儿童的犹太复国主义政权以比以前更严厉的教训。 @FotrosResistancee

text: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 Advisor to Iran’s Parliament Speaker: ‘Trump's extension of the ceasefire makes no sense. The losing side cannot set the terms. Continuing the siege is no different from bombing and must be responded to militarily. Meanwhile, Trump's extension of the ceasefire certainly means buying time for a surprise strike. It is Iran's time to take the initiative.’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长顾问：“特朗普延长停火协议毫无意义。失败的一方不能设定条件。继续围困与轰炸没有区别，必须进行军事回应。同时，特朗普延长停火协议肯定意味着为突然袭击争取时间。现在是伊朗采取主动的时候了。” @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Trump admin understood well that keeping Iran in a state of no war no peace and sabotaging its fragile economy is more impactful than airstrikes is important to answer why he extended the ceasefire. Suffocating Iran in the Hormoz and beyond while the U.S, Israel, and Arab are at peace and well. The closure of the Red sea's strait should be done and asap, or else Iran will suffocate alone and it will be very impactful It is these days when Iran has very few choices is how it loses the war and cements a U.S victory. Action needed and very smart planning as you cannot defeat the U.S conventionally.
text_zh: 特朗普政府非常清楚，让伊朗处于不战不和的状态并破坏其脆弱的经济比空袭更有影响力，这对于回答他为何延长停火协议很重要。在美、以、阿和平且安好的情况下，在霍尔木兹海峡及其他地区窒息伊朗。红海海峡的封锁应该尽快完成，否则伊朗将独自窒息，这将产生非常大的影响。正是在伊朗选择很少的这些日子里，它输掉了战争并巩固了美国的胜利。需要采取行动和非常聪明的计划，因为你无法在常规战争中击败美国。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇷🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 12: U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee has been ordered back to the United States for "consultations" at the White House, against the backdrop of developments with Iran and ahead of negotiations with Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 CNN: U.S. Ambassador to Israel Huckabee will be part of the upcoming direct negotiations between Israel and Lebanon. text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇷🇱🇧 以色列第12频道：在美国与伊朗的事态发展以及与黎巴嫩的谈判之前，美国驻以色列大使迈克·赫卡比已被召回美国，在白宫进行‘磋商’。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 CNN：美国驻以色列大使赫卡比将参加即将举行的以色列与黎巴嫩之间的直接谈判。美国国务卿卢比奥将再次参加会谈。 @wfwitness
